predefinedClusters.name: Parisian Minimal / Quiet Luxury
predefinedClusters.dna: Clean lines, neutral palette, quality materials, understated sophistication. Form follows restraint.

predefinedClusters.name: Korean New Wave
predefinedClusters.dna: Oversized silhouettes, casual cool, Seoul street DNA. Accessible luxury feel without screaming luxury.

predefinedClusters.name: Romantic / Feminine Editorial
predefinedClusters.dna: Feminine shapes, nostalgic 70-90s references, playful proportions. Occasion-ready but not boring.

predefinedClusters.name: Artisan / Craft Heritage
predefinedClusters.dna: Handcraft storytelling, unique or natural materials, limited scale. You buy the story as much as the bag.

predefinedClusters.name: Statement / Art Object
predefinedClusters.dna: Conceptual design first, sculptural silhouettes, conversation starters. The bag IS the look.

predefinedClusters.name: Scandinavian Cool
predefinedClusters.dna: Effortless with slight irony, not-boring minimal. Sustainable undertones. Fashion as lifestyle not performance.

predefinedClusters.name: Japanese Craft / Functional
predefinedClusters.dna: Material-first philosophy, functional beauty, wabi-sabi principles. Aging as feature, not flaw.

predefinedClusters.name: Vietnam Mass Market
predefinedClusters.dna: Accessible price points, fashion-forward for mass market, OL (office lady) image dominates.

predefinedClusters.name: Vietnam Gen Z Local
predefinedClusters.dna: Young, experimental local brand identity. Affordable-mid range. Aspiring to international aesthetic but distinctly local.

predefinedClusters.name: Korean Conceptual
predefinedClusters.dna: Fashion as concept, ironic or deconstructed approach. Seoul underground art scene meets fashion.

predefinedClusters.name: New York Edge
predefinedClusters.dna: Downtown NY energy — sporty-meets-sexy or creative-city professional. Black dominates, attitude required.

predefinedClusters.name: Luxury Reference Tier
predefinedClusters.dna: The ceiling of the market — reference points for understanding luxury codes, not direct competitors.
